assertions.assertion: Local /api/orders endpoint uses .AsBffApiEndpoint() for CSRF protection
assertions.rationale: The local endpoint explicitly calls `.AsBffApiEndpoint()` with a comment explaining CSRF protection.

assertions.assertion: Calls AddRemoteApis() on the BFF builder
assertions.rationale: The code chains `.AddRemoteApis()` on the BFF builder with a comment that it's required in v4.

assertions.assertion: Uses MapRemoteBffApiEndpoint for /api/catalog pointing to https://catalog-service.internal/api

assertions.rationale: Code shows `.WithAccessToken(RequiredTokenType.User)` on the remote endpoint.
